compiled_state.description:
## Finding (S2 + S12 — verified)
Two files sit at exactly 800 LOC (next line fails CI) and one grew +40% toward the cap. Note: `apply_inbound.py` is separately relieved by the reconciler-function-extraction ticket; this ticket covers the standalone files.

Citations: `src/rebar/grounding/engine_b.py` (699->800); `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/apply_inbound.py` (784->800, see extraction ticket); `src/rebar/_cli/_llm_commands.py` (546->763, +40%, not allowlisted).

## Remediation
Split each along an existing cohesive seam for headroom (no <100-LOC fragments): `engine_b.py` — extract one detector/helper cluster into a sibling module; `_llm_commands.py` — split by command family (e.g. review vs verify-completion vs scan).

cascade_flag: relocates functions across module boundaries — check importers (module-qualified imports; CLI command registration).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `engine_b.py` and `_llm_commands.py` are back in the 200-500 band with headroom
- [ ] Import paths / CLI command registration preserved
- [ ] No file <100 LOC created by the split
compiled_state.title: Relieve at-cap / fast-growing files (engine_b.py, _llm_commands.py)
